_builder_version=”4.19.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||19px||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.19.5″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″]

FLOW YOTI 3 LIGHT is a lightweight mini paraglider designed for pilots who seek the ultimate ease of use on the ground and agility in the air.

Hike & fly, strong wind soaring, thermal XC flights – the Yoti 3 Light is capable of it all. At 2.15kgs, this wing is the most versatile glider in our range, making a perfect travel companion. Speed, stability, and best glide in the class on a stable shark nose profile.

FEATURES:

  • Advanced shark nose airfoil
  • Extremely light
  • Reduced line layout
  • Trimmers and speed sytem
  • Improved cell tensioning
  • Excellent playful handling

More information coming soon.

excerpt.rendered: FLOW YOTI 3 LIGHT is a lightweight mini paraglider designed for pilots who seek the ultimate ease of use on the ground and agility in the air. Hike & fly, strong wind soaring, thermal XC flights – the Yoti 3 Light is capable of it all. At 2.15kgs, this wing is the most versatile glider […]
